Press

News and announcements from Interzenex Microfinance.

Media Inquiries

Press Releases

June 2026

Interzenex Microfinance Surpasses 500,000 Active Users Globally

The digital microfinance platform announces a milestone of half a million active customers across 190 countries, citing growth in emerging-market adoption.

March 2026

Launch of Approval Code System — A New Standard in Transfer Authorization

Interzenex Microfinance introduces a patent-pending daily-transfer limit system controlled by admin-issued approval codes, raising the bar for institutional-grade retail banking security.

January 2026

Interzenex Microfinance Expands Currency Support to 140+ World Currencies

Following customer demand from 45 new markets, the platform now supports 140 ISO 4217 currencies for account denomination and cross-currency conversion.

September 2025

Interzenex Microfinance Achieves SOC 2 Type II Certification

An independent audit confirms that Interzenex Microfinance's security, availability, and confidentiality controls meet the AICPA's rigorous Trust Services Criteria.
